ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_no" INTEGER /* Player's jersey number */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Player's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Player's last name */,
  "position" TEXT /* Player's position (e.g., DT, DL) */,
  "height" TEXT /* Player's height (e.g., 6-5) */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Player's weight in pounds */,
  "class" TEXT /* Player's class (e.g., Fr, Soph, Jr, Sr) */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* Player's hometown */,
  "recruited_by" INTEGER /* ID of the coach who recruited the player */,
  "recruitment_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was recruited */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "high_school" TEXT /* Player's high school */,
  "parent_guardian_name" TEXT /* Name of player's parent/guardian */,
  "parent_guardian_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of player's parent/guardian */,
  "parent_guardian_email" TEXT /* Email address of player's parent/guardian */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_position FOREIGN KEY ("position") REFERENCES positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_recruited_by FOREIGN KEY ("recruited_by") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Coach's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Coach's last name */,
  "email" TEXT /* Coach's email address */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Coach's phone number */,
  "position" TEXT /* Coach's position or role */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Coach's office location */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Coach's office hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance record */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., yards, tackles) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the performance is related to */,
  "practice_id" INTEGER /* ID of the practice session the performance is related to */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_practice_id FOREIGN KEY ("practice_id") REFERENCES practices ("practice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Name of the opponent */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., Win, Loss) */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "practices" (
  "practice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each practice session */,
  "practice_date" TEXT /* Date of the practice session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the practice session */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the practice session */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach leading the practice */,
  "focus" TEXT /* Focus of the practice session (e.g., offense, defense) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("practice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_practices_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., game, practice) */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "transportation" TEXT /* Transportation arrangement for the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_schedules_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_schedules_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES practices ("practice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_schedules_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., sprain, fracture) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  "recovery_date" TEXT /* Expected recovery date */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor or medical professional */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment plan for the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES medical_staff ("doctor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_staff" (
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each doctor or medical professional */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Doctor's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Doctor's last name */,
  "email" TEXT /* Doctor's email address */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Doctor's phone number */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Doctor's specialty (e.g., Orthopedic Surgeon, Physical Therapist) */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Doctor's office hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_academics" (
  "academic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester (e.g., Fall 2023) */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received in the course */,
  "credits_earned" INTEGER /* Number of credits earned */,
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic advisor */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Player's current GPA */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("academic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_academics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_academics_advisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("advisor_id") REFERENCES academic_advisors ("advisor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_advisors" (
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic advisor */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Advisor's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Advisor's last name */,
  "email" TEXT /* Advisor's email address */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Advisor's phone number */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the advisor belongs to */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Advisor's office hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("advisor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "goal_type" TEXT /* Type of goal (e.g., personal, team) */,
  "goal_description" TEXT /* Description of the goal */,
  "target_date" TEXT /* Target date for achieving the goal */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the goal (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach who set the goal */,
  "progress" REAL /* Current progress towards the goal (0-100%) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_goals_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_goals_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recruits" (
  "recruit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recruit */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Recruit's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Recruit's last name */,
  "high_school" TEXT /* Recruit's high school */,
  "position" TEXT /* Recruit's position */,
  "height" TEXT /* Recruit's height */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Recruit's weight */,
  "recruited_by" INTEGER /* ID of the coach who recruited the player */,
  "recruitment_year" INTEGER /* Year the recruit was recruited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recruit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offers" (
  "offer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each offer */,
  "recruit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recruit */,
  "offer_date" TEXT /* Date the offer was made */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the offer expires */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the scholarship offer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offers_recruit_id FOREIGN KEY ("recruit_id") REFERENCES recruits ("recruit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commitments" (
  "commitment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commitment */,
  "recruit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recruit */,
  "commitment_date" TEXT /* Date the commitment was made */,
  "commitment_type" TEXT /* Type of commitment (e.g., verbal, signed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commitment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commitments_recruit_id FOREIGN KEY ("recruit_id") REFERENCES recruits ("recruit_id")
)
